meta.title: Short user story title
meta.module: Module name (e.g. Checkout, Auth, Invite, Search)

test_cases.title: Short, action-oriented test case title
test_cases.test_scenario: One-liner: what scenario is being verified
test_cases.type: Functional | Negative | Edge-Boundary | Non-Functional | E2E-Integration | Smoke | Security | Accessibility | Performance | Exploratory
test_cases.preconditions: What must be true before the test runs

gaps.requirement_text: The requirement as written in the design doc (or 'NOT SPECIFIED')
gaps.gap_type: Missing | Missing acceptance criteria | Ambiguous | Contradictory | Untestable
gaps.issue: What is unclear, missing, contradictory, or untestable
gaps.suggested_fix: Concrete suggestion to close the gap

security_checks: Verify auth tokens cannot be replayed after use
Verify session expiry blocks mid-flow actions
accessibility_checks: Verify WCAG 2.1 AA compliance on all screens
Test full flow with VoiceOver and TalkBack
performance_checks: Primary screen loads within an acceptable budget on 4G
Primary API responds within an acceptable budget
exploratory_ideas: Test with multiple browser tabs open simultaneously
Test with network interruption at each step of the flow
Test session expiry between each step
